lines.gurmukhi: ਸਫਲੁ ਜਨਮੁ ਸਰੀਰੁ ਸਭੁ ਹੋਆ ਜਿਤੁ ਰਾਮ ਨਾਮੁ ਪਰਗਾਸਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: safal janam sareer sabh hoaa jit raam naam paragaasiaa |
lines.english: Their lives and bodies become totally blessed and fruitful; the Lord's Name illumines them.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਹਰਿ ਭਜੁ ਸਦਾ ਦਿਨੁ ਰਾਤੀ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਨਿਜ ਘਰਿ ਵਾਸਿਆ ॥੬॥
lines.translit: naanak har bhaj sadaa din raatee guramukh nij ghar vaasiaa |6|
lines.english: O Nanak, by continually vibrating upon the Lord, day and night, the Gurmukhs abide in the home of the inner self. ||6||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨ ਸਰਧਾ ਰਾਮ ਨਾਮਿ ਲਗੀ ਤਿਨੑ ਦੂਜੈ ਚਿਤੁ ਨ ਲਾਇਆ ਰਾਮ ॥
lines.translit: jin saradhaa raam naam lagee tina doojai chit na laaeaa raam |
lines.english: Those who place their faith in the Lord's Name, do not attach their consciousness to another.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੇ ਧਰਤੀ ਸਭ ਕੰਚਨੁ ਕਰਿ ਦੀਜੈ ਬਿਨੁ ਨਾਵੈ ਅਵਰੁ ਨ ਭਾਇਆ ਰਾਮ ॥
lines.translit: je dharatee sabh kanchan kar deejai bin naavai avar na bhaaeaa raam |
lines.english: Even if the entire earth were to be transformed into gold, and given to them, without the Naam, they love nothing else.

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਾਮ ਨਾਮੁ ਮਨਿ ਭਾਇਆ ਪਰਮ ਸੁਖੁ ਪਾਇਆ ਅੰਤਿ ਚਲਦਿਆ ਨਾਲਿ ਸਖਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: raam naam man bhaaeaa param sukh paaeaa ant chaladiaa naal sakhaaee |
lines.english: The Lord's Name is pleasing to their minds, and they obtain supreme peace; when they depart in the end, it shall go with them as their support.

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਾਮ ਨਾਮ ਧਨੁ ਪੂੰਜੀ ਸੰਚੀ ਨਾ ਡੂਬੈ ਨਾ ਜਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: raam naam dhan poonjee sanchee naa ddoobai naa jaaee |
lines.english: I have gathered the capital, the wealth of the Lord's Name; it does not sink, and does not depart.

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਾਮ ਨਾਮੁ ਇਸੁ ਜੁਗ ਮਹਿ ਤੁਲਹਾ ਜਮਕਾਲੁ ਨੇੜਿ ਨ ਆਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: raam naam is jug meh tulahaa jamakaal nerr na aavai |
lines.english: The Lord's Name is the only true support in this age; the Messenger of Death does not draw near it.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਰਾਮੁ ਪਛਾਤਾ ਕਰਿ ਕਿਰਪਾ ਆਪਿ ਮਿਲਾਵੈ ॥੭॥
lines.translit: naanak guramukh raam pachhaataa kar kirapaa aap milaavai |7|
lines.english: O Nanak, the Gurmukhs recognize the Lord; in His Mercy, He unites them with Himself. ||7||

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਾਮੋ ਰਾਮ ਨਾਮੁ ਸਤੇ ਸਤਿ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਜਾਣਿਆ ਰਾਮ ॥
lines.translit: raamo raam naam sate sat guramukh jaaniaa raam |
lines.english: True, True is the Name of the Lord, Raam, Raam; the Gurmukh knows the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੇਵਕੋ ਗੁਰ ਸੇਵਾ ਲਾਗਾ ਜਿਨਿ ਮਨੁ ਤਨੁ ਅਰਪਿ ਚੜਾਇਆ ਰਾਮ ॥
lines.translit: sevako gur sevaa laagaa jin man tan arap charraaeaa raam |
lines.english: The Lord's servant is the one who commits himself to the Guru's service, and dedicates his mind and body as an offering to Him.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨੁ ਤਨੁ ਅਰਪਿਆ ਬਹੁਤੁ ਮਨਿ ਸਰਧਿਆ ਗੁਰ ਸੇਵਕ ਭਾਇ ਮਿਲਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: man tan arapiaa bahut man saradhiaa gur sevak bhaae milaae |
lines.english: He dedicates his mind and body to Him, placing great faith in Him; the Guru lovingly unites His servant with Himself.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੀਨਾ ਨਾਥੁ ਜੀਆ ਕਾ ਦਾਤਾ ਪੂਰੇ ਗੁਰ ਤੇ ਪਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: deenaa naath jeea kaa daataa poore gur te paae |
lines.english: The Master of the meek, the Giver of souls, is obtained through the Perfect Guru.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰੂ ਸਿਖੁ ਸਿਖੁ ਗੁਰੂ ਹੈ ਏਕੋ ਗੁਰ ਉਪਦੇਸੁ ਚਲਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: guroo sikh sikh guroo hai eko gur upades chalaae |
lines.english: The Guru's Sikh, and the Sikh's Guru, are one and the same; both spread the Guru's Teachings.

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਾਮ ਨਾਮ ਮੰਤੁ ਹਿਰਦੈ ਦੇਵੈ ਨਾਨਕ ਮਿਲਣੁ ਸੁਭਾਏ ॥੮॥੨॥੯॥
lines.translit: raam naam mant hiradai devai naanak milan subhaae |8|2|9|
lines.english: The Mantra of the Lord's Name is enshrined within the heart, O Nanak, and we merge with the Lord so easily. ||8||2||9||

lines.gurmukhi: ੴ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਪ੍ਰਸਾਦਿ ॥
lines.translit: ik oankaar satigur prasaad |
lines.english: One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਸਾ ਛੰਤ ਮਹਲਾ ੪ ਘਰੁ ੨ ॥
lines.translit: aasaa chhant mahalaa 4 ghar 2 |
lines.english: Aasaa, Chhant, Fourth Mehl, Second House:

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਕਰਤਾ ਦੂਖ ਬਿਨਾਸਨੁ ਪਤਿਤ ਪਾਵਨੁ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਜੀਉ ॥
lines.translit: har har karataa dookh binaasan patit paavan har naam jeeo |
lines.english: The Creator Lord, Har, Har, is the Destroyer of distress; the Name of the Lord is the Purifier of sinners.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਊਤਮੁ ਕਾਮੁ ਜਪੀਐ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਹਰਿ ਜਪੀਐ ਅਸਥਿਰੁ ਹੋਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: har aootam kaam japeeai har naam har japeeai asathir hovai |
lines.english: Chanting the Name of the Lord is the most exalted occupation; chanting the Name of the Lord, one becomes immortal.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਸੇਵਾ ਭਾਈ ਪਰਮ ਗਤਿ ਪਾਈ ਹਰਿ ਊਤਮੁ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਕਾਮੁ ਜੀਉ ॥
lines.translit: har sevaa bhaaee param gat paaee har aootam har har kaam jeeo |
lines.english: One who lovingly serves the Lord, obtains the supreme status. Service to the Lord, Har, Har, is more exalted than anything.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਨਮ ਮਰਣ ਦੋਵੈ ਦੁਖ ਮੇਟੇ ਸਹਜੇ ਹੀ ਸੁਖਿ ਸੋਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: janam maran dovai dukh mette sahaje hee sukh sovai |
lines.english: The pains of both birth and death are eradicated, and one comes to sleep in peaceful ease.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਕਿਰਪਾ ਧਾਰਹੁ ਠਾਕੁਰ ਹਰਿ ਜਪੀਐ ਆਤਮ ਰਾਮੁ ਜੀਉ ॥
lines.translit: har har kirapaa dhaarahu tthaakur har japeeai aatam raam jeeo |
lines.english: O Lord, O Lord and Master, shower Your Mercy upon me; within my mind, I chant the Name of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਕਰਤਾ ਦੂਖ ਬਿਨਾਸਨੁ ਪਤਿਤ ਪਾਵਨੁ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਜੀਉ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: har har karataa dookh binaasan patit paavan har naam jeeo |1|
lines.english: The Creator Lord, Har, Har, is the Destroyer of distress; the Name of the Lord is the Purifier of sinners. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਪਦਾਰਥੁ ਕਲਿਜੁਗਿ ਊਤਮੁ ਹਰਿ ਜਪੀਐ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਭਾਇ ਜੀਉ ॥
lines.translit: har naam padaarath kalijug aootam har japeeai satigur bhaae jeeo |
lines.english: The wealth of the Lord's Name is the most exalted in this Dark Age of Kali Yuga; chant the Lord's Name according to the Way of the True Guru.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਜਪਿਆ ਦੁਖੁ ਬਿਨਸਿਆ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਪਰਮ ਸੁਖੁ ਪਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: har har naam japiaa dukh binasiaa har naam param sukh paaeaa |
lines.english: Chanting the Name of the Lord, Har, Har, pains are removed. Through the Name of the Lord, supreme peace is obtained.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਹਰਿ ਪੜੀਐ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਹਰਿ ਸੁਣੀਐ ਹਰਿ ਜਪਤ ਸੁਣਤ ਦੁਖੁ ਜਾਇ ਜੀਉ ॥
lines.translit: guramukh har parreeai guramukh har suneeai har japat sunat dukh jaae jeeo |
lines.english: As Gurmukh, read of the Lord; as Gurmukh, hear of the Lord. Chanting and listening to the Lord's Name, pain departs.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਗਿਆਨੁ ਬਲਿਆ ਘਟਿ ਚਾਨਣੁ ਅਗਿਆਨੁ ਅੰਧੇਰੁ ਗਵਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: satigur giaan baliaa ghatt chaanan agiaan andher gavaaeaa |
lines.english: The spiritual wisdom of the True Guru illumines the heart; this Light dispels the darkness of spiritual ignorance.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਤਿਨੀ ਆਰਾਧਿਆ ਜਿਨ ਮਸਤਕਿ ਧੁਰਿ ਲਿਖਿ ਪਾਇ ਜੀਉ ॥
lines.translit: har har naam tinee aaraadhiaa jin masatak dhur likh paae jeeo |
lines.english: They alone meditate on the Lord's Name, Har, Har, upon whose foreheads such destiny is written.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਪਦਾਰਥੁ ਕਲਿਜੁਗਿ ਊਤਮੁ ਹਰਿ ਜਪੀਐ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਭਾਇ ਜੀਉ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: har naam padaarath kalijug aootam har japeeai satigur bhaae jeeo |2|
lines.english: The wealth of the Lord's Name is the most exalted in this Dark Age of Kali Yuga; chant the Lord's Name according to the Way of the True Guru. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਮਨਿ ਭਾਇਆ ਪਰਮ ਸੁਖ ਪਾਇਆ ਹਰਿ ਲਾਹਾ ਪਦੁ ਨਿਰਬਾਣੁ ਜੀਉ ॥
lines.translit: har har man bhaaeaa param sukh paaeaa har laahaa pad nirabaan jeeo |
lines.english: One whose mind loves the Lord, Har, Har, obtains supreme peace. He reaps the profit of the Lord's Name, the state of Nirvaanaa.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਪ੍ਰੀਤਿ ਲਗਾਈ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਸਖਾਈ ਭ੍ਰਮੁ ਚੂਕਾ ਆਵਣੁ ਜਾਣੁ ਜੀਉ ॥
lines.translit: har preet lagaaee har naam sakhaaee bhram chookaa aavan jaan jeeo |
lines.english: He embraces love for the Lord, and the Lord's Name becomes his companion. His doubts, and his comings and goings are ended.
